title: GMSpVoucher
description: Gives players vouchers for temporary Spectator mode.
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

The GMSpVoucher plugin allows server administrators to grant players temporary access to Spectator mode using custom in-game vouchers. This plugin is perfect for survival or adventure servers that want to offer players a special reward or perk without permanently giving them Spectator privileges. The plugin uses a custom item, called a GMSp Voucher, that players can use to enter Spectator mode for a fixed duration (5 minutes by default). This item provides a safe and controlled way to explore, observe, or navigate through the world. One key requirement for this plugin is that it depends on the [AshLib library](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/resource-detail/30), which must be installed for the plugin to function correctly. [Here is a detailed breakdown of its features and functionality.](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/resource-detail/50)

Check out AshSource for more plugins and resources [ashsource.ashkiano.com](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/)
